articles.title_en: U.K. Sanctions Russia’s New Arctic LNG Fleet in War Economy Crackdown
articles.lead_en: The four targeted LNG ships were included in a broader sanctions package hitting 70 individuals and entities.

articles.title_en: The Russian Federation expects to hold a meeting of the intergovernmental commission with Turkey before the end of the year

articles.title_en: Dmitriev: “poison pills” of the EU and EC are only delaying negotiations on Ukraine
articles.lead_en: The Special Representative of the President of the Russian Federation for investment and economic cooperation with foreign countries noted that hypocrisy, when exposed, does not bring any benefit

articles.title_en: Mishustin will visit Uzbekistan on a two-day working visit
articles.lead_en: The Chairman of the Russian Government will hold negotiations with the country's leadership, during which "it is planned to consider current issues of Russian-Uzbek interaction in the trade, economic, investment, scientific, technological, cultural and humanitarian spheres"
articles.title_raw: Мишустин посетит Узбекистан с двухдневным рабочим визитом
articles.lead_raw: Председатель правительства России проведет переговоры с руководством страны, в ходе которых "планируется рассмотреть актуальные вопросы российско-узбекистанского взаимодействия в торгово-экономической, инвестиционной, научно-технологической и культурно-гуманитарной сферах"

articles.title_en: Russia’s central bank chief Nabiullina to appear at press conference after nearly two weeks out of public view — she missed the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum and a meeting with Putin
articles.lead_en: Russia’s central bank chair, Elvira Nabiullina, will appear at a press conference on June 19 following a Board of Directors meeting on monetary policy, the bank’s press service announced.

articles.title_en: Aksakov predicts a reduction in the key rate to 13% by the end of summer
articles.lead_en: At the next meeting on June 19, the Board of Directors of the Bank of Russia may lower it by 0.5 percentage points, to 14%, says the head of the State Duma Committee on the Financial Market
articles.title_raw: Аксаков прогнозирует снижение ключевой ставки до 13% к концу лета
articles.lead_raw: На ближайшем заседании 19 июня совет директоров Банка России может понизить ее на 0,5 процентного пункта, до 14%, считает глава комитета Госдумы по финансовому рынку

articles.title_en: Mishustin suggested that Laos more actively use electronic trading platforms of the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: The Prime Minister noted that they provide an opportunity for good promotion of Laotian goods on the Russian market

articles.title_en: Mishustin will hold talks with the Prime Minister of Laos in Moscow on June 15
articles.lead_en: The heads of government plan to discuss current issues of Russian-Laotian trade, economic, scientific, technical, as well as cultural and humanitarian cooperation

articles.title_en: Titov: almost all pharmaceuticals are not subject to Western sanctions
articles.lead_en: The Chairman of the Russian part of the Russian-Chinese Committee for Friendship, Peace and Development noted that “therefore, the markets here are open and regulated primarily by qualitative indicators of the compliance of drugs with their intended purpose.”
articles.title_raw: Титов: почти вся фармацевтика не подпала под западные санкции
articles.lead_raw: Председатель российской части Российско-Китайского комитета дружбы, мира и развития отметил, что "поэтому здесь рынки открыты и регулируются прежде всего качественными показателями соответствия препаратов их предназначению"
